name: Exclusion of Statistical Income Reconstruction

eligibility.description: Applies to individual taxpayers where the IRS uses external statistical data rather than the taxpayer's own records to determine income.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The IRS bears the burden of proof if they attempt to reconstruct an individual's income solely using statistical information from unrelated taxpayers (e.g., industry averages), providing a defense against arbitrary income assessments.
